name: chapter opening continuation applies author state

source.purpose: Pure-function regression coverage for continuation chapter opening: thread transitions happen before hydration, pressure preparation uses prior active threads, opening location/time reset, scene bundle cache clears, and firstTurnIndex stays monotonic.

thread_resolved.title: The spent petition
thread_resolved.failureMode: The petition curdles into public blame.
thread_resolved.retrievalCue: The petition was the prior chapter's loose end.

chapter_frame.title: The Registry Bell
chapter_frame.premise: The old petition is settled, but the registry turns the settlement's silence into new leverage.
chapter_frame.active_pressure: The bell makes every private delay public.
chapter_frame.central_tension: Whether the player can keep procedure from becoming a spectacle.
chapter_frame.chapter_scope: One registry office, one ringing deadline, one visible witness.
chapter_frame.objective: Stop the registry bell from converting delay into public sanction.
chapter_frame.crucible: The player must decide whether to answer publicly or pull the witness aside.

outcome_spectrum.clean: The bell is silenced before the witness is named.
outcome_spectrum.costly: The bell stops, but the witness pays a visible cost.
outcome_spectrum.failure: The registry records the delay as refusal.
outcome_spectrum.catastrophic: The crowd treats the player as the cause of the sanction.

antagonist_field.core_pressure: Public procedure turns delay into blame.

possible_faces.name: Clerk Vale
possible_faces.becomes_primary_when: The bell rings a second time.

antagonist_field.escalation_logic: Each unanswered chime names one more delay in public.

starting_npcs.name: Clerk Vale
starting_npcs.voice_note: counts before answering, then says the smallest possible sentence
starting_npcs.hidden_pressure: Needs the witness named before the office closes.
starting_npcs.retrieval_cue: Vale makes silence count against the player.
starting_npcs.disposition_reason: Vale believes mercy creates audit exposure.

active_threads.title: The intake problem
active_threads.question: Can the intake pressure be kept from becoming public sanction?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The registry accepts a concrete answer or public sanction begins.
active_threads.failure_mode: The registry records delay as refusal.
active_threads.retrieval_cue: The carried intake thread now lives in the registry bell.

active_threads.title: The registry bell
active_threads.question: Who pays when the bell makes delay public?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The bell is stopped or its target is named.
active_threads.failure_mode: The crowd learns who can be punished for the delay.
active_threads.retrieval_cue: The registry bell turns silence into public pressure.

thread_transitions.reason: The petition was answered, but only by exposing the witness.

pressure_ladder.pressure: Vale lets the bell ring a second time.
pressure_ladder.narrative_effect: The witness hears their danger become public.

arc_link.chapter_function: Turn a settled petition into public institutional pressure.
arc_link.player_stance_read: The player has not chosen public answer or private mercy.

pacing_contract.chapter_question: Can the player stop the bell without naming the witness?
pacing_contract.middle_pressure: Force a public or private answer.

opening_scene_spec.atmospheric_condition: late afternoon; brass bell humming over the counter
opening_scene_spec.initial_state: The first chime is still vibrating when Vale looks up.
opening_scene_spec.first_player_facing: Vale asks whether the answer should be recorded aloud.
opening_scene_spec.immediate_choice: Answer publicly or draw Vale away from the counter.

human_stakes.what_is_lost: Vale becomes the clerk who hid a public deadline.
